prohibited_claims: Predicting death, disaster, or unavoidable harm
Guaranteeing wealth, marriage, pregnancy, or career outcomes
Claiming certainty from one chart factor alone
Giving medical, legal, or financial instructions as fate-based advice
Saying a user is doomed, cursed, broken, or destined to fail
required_style_constraints: Limit caution to one primary area
Never describe metaphysical signals as scientific fact
